content.en:
Rumble!!!

The Xuan Turtle Dao Ancestor and the Yan Crack Dao Ancestor fought, and the strength of the two sides was about the same, so it was difficult to distinguish the winner in a short period of time.

Soon, the Heavenly Emperor Palace knew that the Xuan Turtle Dao Ancestor had been intercepted, and immediately sent the second Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, the Sky Palace Master!

But the Sky Palace Lord was also intercepted halfway, and it was the Crescent Moon Dao Ancestor of the Black Wind Mountain who shot it, and he was also a half-step Domain Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

The appearance of a half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm caused an uproar.

At this time, many Dao Ancestors knew that there were so many Ten Thousand Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm who were even more powerful than the Golden Crow Palace Lord, and they were all very shocked.

But they didn't dare to meddle in such a big war, so they could only spy secretly.

This is a contest between the Heavenly Emperor Palace and the Black Wind Mountain, and it is not easy to say who will lose and who will win.

Heavenly Emperor's Palace.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord said: "Dragon Shadow Palace Master, the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain has been dispatched, and our Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor may not be more than the other party. Even if he sends a half-step domain ancestor in the Ten Thousand Things Realm, it is estimated that he will only expose his strength!"

"I understand!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord said slightly.

Immediately, he walked out of the Heavenly Emperor Palace and went to the Forbidden Void Realm to rescue the Blue Dragon Palace Lord.

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master, let's talk!"

A half-step domain ancestor stopped the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

"Get out!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord snorted coldly, turned into a forbidden dragon, and rushed towards the other party with an incomparably terrifying attack power.

If an ordinary half-step domain ancestor faced this forbidden dao technique, he would be directly killed into nothingness in an instant, and even the half-step domain ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm would be unable to block this move.

However, that person was so calm that he used a defensive forbidden dao technique, turning into a shield of light to block the Dragon Shadow Palace Master.

Boom!

This time of collision, the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord flew out upside down, but the half-step domain ancestor was very indifferent, as if he had not been impacted.

"Returning to the One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor!Who the hell are you?"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord's expression changed drastically.

He had always guessed that Black Wind Mountain had a half-step domain ancestor of the Guiyi Realm, but he was never sure.

But now, Black Wind Mountain really sent a half-step domain ancestor to the One Realm.

"Officially, I'm the Mountain Master of Black Wind Mountain!"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain spoke.

"Wind Mountain Mountain Lord! I always thought that the Mountain Lord of Black Wind Mountain was a legend, but I didn't expect it to really exist! You can really hide, even the Vast Sea Ancestor doesn't know about your existence!"

He was very curious, how did the Wind Mountain Lord hide so much power, after all, the vast sea realm was under the control of the vast sea ancestor at the beginning, and he could explore all places, but he didn't find the headquarters of Black Wind Mountain, which was really incomprehensible.

"The Vast Sea Realm is not the Domain Realm created by the Ancestor of the Vast Sea Domain, he only inherited the Vast Sea Realm, strictly speaking, he is only half of the Realm Lord, so it is impossible to explore all the places, it is naturally not difficult for us in Black Wind Mountain to hide!"

The main road of Fengshan Mountain.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord knew that his strength should not be as good as that of the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord, and it was a little difficult to get past the Wind Mountain Lord.

"Wind Mountain Lord, this time it is our Heavenly Emperor Palace that is at a loss, but our Heavenly Emperor Palace has already fallen a palace master, how about it? I will bring the Qinglong Palace Lord back, and you will take the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor away, so that everyone is good!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord proposed.

"I'm sorry, I don't agree!" The Lord of Wind Mountain said: "Your Heavenly Emperor Palace intercepted and killed our Invincible Dao Ancestor of Black Wind Mountain at will, and the Invincible Dao Ancestor is not bullying you five and a half step domain ancestors, but you are bullying us Black Wind Mountain, we Black Wind Mountain didn't say anything, what qualifications do you have to say it?"

"Wind Mountain Lord, do you really want to start a war, our Heavenly Emperor Palace is also a legendary-level force, if we use the hole cards left by the Vast Sea Ancestor, it will not be difficult to destroy your Black Wind Mountain!"

"Hahaha, destroy our Black Wind Mountain, even your vast sea ancestors didn't dare to destroy our Black Wind Mountain at the beginning, why are you?"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain sneered.

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord was angry, and the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord simply didn't take their Heavenly Emperor Palace in his eyes, and the threat was useless.

The other side.

Ye Tian was still fighting with the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, the True Martial Palace Lord, the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord, and the Starry Sky Palace Lord.

And the Starry Sky Palace Lord was already seriously injured and dying, and tried to escape, but he didn't escape, and was pierced through his body by Ye Tian's blow after blow.

In the end, the Starry Sky Palace Lord was nailed into the void by a great Dark Pole Spear, and completely fell and died.

With the fall of the Starry Sky Palace Lord, the Blue Dragon Palace Lord, the True Martial Palace Lord, and the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord are no opponents at all.

This time, Ye Tian targeted the True Martial Palace Lord, because the Qinglong Palace Lord was the strongest, it was a bit troublesome to kill the Qinglong Palace Lord, and the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord had a fast recovery power and a strong life-saving ability, only the True Martial Palace Lord was the best to kill.

Poof!

The body of the True Martial Palace Lord was pierced, and he was hit hard all of a sudden.

With another blow, the True Martial Palace Master was knocked away, his whole body cracked, and he was in a very serious state of serious injury.

Just as Ye Tian was about to attack the True Martial Palace Master again, a voice came into Ye Tian's soul.

"Brother Ye, don't kill the True Martial Palace Master!"

Hearing this voice, Ye Tian knew the identity of the other party, it was Ouyang Jiu'er.

Immediately, he had some enlightenment.

So, he began to attack the Vermilion Bird Palace Lord and the True Martial Palace Master, and occasionally attacked the True Martial Palace Master, but he just didn't kill the True Martial Palace Master.

Meanwhile.

He summoned the half-step domain ancestors of Black Wind Mountain, asking Black Wind Mountain to negotiate with the Heavenly Emperor Palace and ask for some benefits, and he would not kill the palace masters of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

......

"Dragon Shadow Palace Master, your Heavenly Emperor Palace still has three Palace Masters in the Forbidden Void Realm, and we in Black Wind Mountain don't want to kill too many of your half-step domain ancestors. In this way, your Heavenly Emperor Palace will pay some price, and I will let the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors leave, how about it?"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain proposed.

"Yes!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord agreed.

He knew that the situation of the Qinglong Palace Lord was too dangerous, and if he didn't agree, he was afraid that another Palace Master would fall.

"Thirty scales of the Darkwing Dapeng Eagle, 10 squares of blood, and 30 bones, plus ten forbidden treasures, how about it?"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain proposed.

"You're robbing!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord was furious.

"This is not a robbery, your Heavenly Emperor Palace also gained a lot at the beginning, and these compensation should be nothing. If we had gone all out in Black Wind Mountain at the beginning, your Heavenly Emperor Palace would not have been able to reap any benefits, and now that you want this little thing, you will be reluctant?"

The Wind Mountain Lord said with a smile.

Although the Dragon Shadow Palace Lord did not participate at the beginning, he also knew that what the Wind Mountain Lord said was very right, if the Wind Mountain Lord made a move, the Heavenly Emperor Palace would not be able to compete at all.

"Okay, I agreed!"

The Dragon Shadow Palace Lord gritted his teeth and said.

Immediately, he took out these treasures and handed them to the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain.

And the Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain also asked the other half-step domain ancestors to inform Ye Tian, the ancestor of the Dao of All Things, and let Ye Tian stop.

--------------

"Hahaha, Qinglong Palace Master, I will spare you this time, if you attack me next time, then you won't have such good luck!"

Ye Tian laughed.

Instantly, he disappeared into the void.
